title: Callaeum psilophyllum
taxonomy: Callaeum psilophyllum is classified in the kingdom Plantae, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is a member of the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. It is further classified into the subclass Asteridae and the family Rubiaceae. Within the family Rubiaceae, Callaeum psilophyllum is a part of the genus Callaeum. The plant's classification is a reflection of its evolutionary relationships with other plants.

intro: Callaeum psilophyllum, also known as the Yellow Trumpetbush, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Callaeum psilophyllum include alkaloids and flavonoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties.
